docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $82.50 FILED BY KAPLAN, WILLIAM S. AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DAVID DBA BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CC COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM WILLIAM KAPLAN FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-14-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-18-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DAVID DBA BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD.
